ja.en: The philosophy of education is the study of the purpose, nature, and effects of education. Broadly defined, education is the process by which society transmits its accumulated knowledge...
ja.zh: 古之学者必有师。师者，所以传道受业解惑也。人非生而知之者，孰能无惑？惑而不从师，其为惑也，终不解矣。生乎吾前，其闻道也固先乎吾，吾从而师之...

双层 PDF 核心优势:

ja.en: The reconstructed searchable PDF embeds an invisible, perfectly aligned text layer above the scanned pixels. Keeps the original appearance while enabling full text highlighting, searching, and copying.
ja.zh: 重构后的可搜索 PDF 功能，会在后台计算 OCR 文字排版物理 Bounding Box，在原始 PDF 图层上层精确注入完全透明的文字图层 (Invisible Text Layer)。这不仅保持了原始扫描文件的图纸外观，还让文本完美支持划词复制、检索和选定。
ja.current: The reconstructed searchable PDF embeds an invisible, perfectly aligned text layer above the scanned pixels. Keeps the original appearance while enabling full text highlighting, searching, and copying.

ja.en: Searchable PDF generated! The scanned sheets are overlaid with interactive text. Highlight and search freely.

ja.zh: 请仅对您拥有或有权修改的PDF使用此工具。未经授权移除受版权保护材料的限制可能违反版权法。

de.current: {count}+ free, secure, and easy-to-use tools for all your PDF needs.

de.en: Find answers to common questions about {brand}
de.zh: 查找有关 {brand} 的常见问题解答
de.current: Find answers to common questions about {brand}

de.en: No FAQs found matching your search.
de.zh: 未找到匹配的常见问题。
de.current: No FAQs found matching your search.

de.en: Yes, PDFCraft is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, no premium tiers, and no registration required. All features are available to everyone.
de.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 完全免费使用。没有隐藏费用，没有高级会员，也无需注册。所有功能对每个人开放。
de.current: Yes, PDFCraft is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, no premium tiers, and no registration required. All features are available to everyone.

de.en: Do I need to create an account?
de.current: Do I need to create an account?

de.en: No, you don't need to create an account or register to use PDFCraft. Simply visit the website and start using any tool immediately.
de.zh: 不需要，您无需创建账户或注册即可使用 PDFCraft。只需访问网站即可立即开始使用任何工具。
de.current: No, you don't need to create an account or register to use PDFCraft. Simply visit the website and start using any tool immediately.

de.en: Are my files uploaded to a server?
de.zh: 我的文件会被上传到服务器吗？
de.current: Are my files uploaded to a server?

de.en: No, your files are never uploaded to any server. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.
de.zh: 不会，您的文件从未上传到任何服务器。所有 PDF 处理都使用 JavaScript 和 WebAssembly 在浏览器本地进行。您的文件从未离开您的设备。
de.current: No, your files are never uploaded to any server. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.

de.en: Is it safe to use PDFCraft with sensitive documents?
de.zh: 使用 PDFCraft 处理敏感文档安全吗？
de.current: Is it safe to use PDFCraft with sensitive documents?

de.en: Yes, PDFCraft is designed with privacy in mind. Since all processing happens locally in your browser, your sensitive documents remain on your device and are never transmitted over the internet.
de.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 的设计以隐私为重。由于所有处理都在浏览器本地进行，您的敏感文档保留在您的设备上，从未通过互联网传输。
de.current: Yes, PDFCraft is designed with privacy in mind. Since all processing happens locally in your browser, your sensitive documents remain on your device and are never transmitted over the internet.

de.en: What happens to my files after processing?
de.zh: 处理后我的文件会怎样？
de.current: What happens to my files after processing?

de.en: Your files are stored temporarily in your browser's memory during processing. Once you close the browser tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store any of your files.
de.zh: 您的文件在处理过程中暂时存储在浏览器的内存中。一旦您关闭浏览器标签页或离开页面，所有文件数据将自动清除。我们不会存储您的任何文件。
de.current: Your files are stored temporarily in your browser's memory during processing. Once you close the browser tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store any of your files.

de.en: What PDF operations can I perform?
de.zh: 我可以执行哪些 PDF 操作？
de.current: What PDF operations can I perform?

de.en: PDFCraft offers 67+ tools including: merge, split, compress, convert (to/from images, text, JSON), edit, annotate, sign, add watermarks, encrypt/decrypt, OCR, and many more.
de.zh: PDFCraft 提供 67+ 个工具，包括：合并、分割、压缩、转换（转为/来自图像、文本、JSON）、编辑、注释、签名、添加水印、加密/解密、OCR 等等。
de.current: PDFCraft offers 67+ tools including: merge, split, compress, convert (to/from images, text, JSON), edit, annotate, sign, add watermarks, encrypt/decrypt, OCR, and many more.

de.en: Can I merge multiple PDF files?
de.zh: 我可以合并多个 PDF 文件吗？
de.current: Can I merge multiple PDF files?

de.en: Yes, you can merge multiple PDF files into one. Simply use the Merge PDF tool, upload your files, arrange them in the desired order, and click merge.
de.zh: 是的，您可以将多个 PDF 文件合并为一个。只需使用合并 PDF 工具，上传您的文件，按所需顺序排列，然后点击合并。
de.current: Yes, you can merge multiple PDF files into one. Simply use the Merge PDF tool, upload your files, arrange them in the desired order, and click merge.

de.en: Can I convert images to PDF?
de.zh: 我可以将图像转换为 PDF 吗？
de.current: Can I convert images to PDF?

de.en: Yes, PDFCraft supports converting various image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) to PDF. You can convert single or multiple images at once.
de.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 支持将各种图像格式（JPG、PNG、WebP、BMP、TIFF、SVG、HEIC）转换为 PDF。您可以一次转换单个或多个图像。
de.current: Yes, PDFCraft supports converting various image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) to PDF. You can convert single or multiple images at once.

de.en: Can I edit text in a PDF?
de.zh: 我可以编辑 PDF 中的文本吗？
de.current: Can I edit text in a PDF?

de.en: PDFCraft provides annotation and editing tools including highlighting, adding text, shapes, images, and signatures. For full text editing, the PDF Editor tool offers comprehensive annotation capabilities.
de.zh: PDFCraft 提供注释和编辑工具，包括高亮、添加文本、形状、图像和签名。如需全文编辑，PDF 编辑器工具提供全面的注释功能。
de.current: PDFCraft provides annotation and editing tools including highlighting, adding text, shapes, images, and signatures. For full text editing, the PDF Editor tool offers comprehensive annotation capabilities.

de.en: PDFCraft works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.
de.zh: PDFCraft 适用于所有现代浏览器，包括 Chrome、Firefox、Safari 和 Edge。我们建议使用最新版本的浏览器以获得最佳体验。
de.current: PDFCraft works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.

de.en: Is there a file size limit?
de.current: Is there a file size limit?

de.en: Most tools support files up to 100MB, with some tools like merge and compress supporting up to 500MB. These limits are in place to ensure smooth performance in your browser.
de.zh: 大多数工具支持最大 100MB 的文件，合并和压缩等工具支持最大 500MB。这些限制是为了确保浏览器中的流畅性能。
de.current: Most tools support files up to 100MB, with some tools like merge and compress supporting up to 500MB. These limits are in place to ensure smooth performance in your browser.

de.en: Why is processing slow for large files?
de.zh: 为什么大文件处理速度慢？
de.current: Why is processing slow for large files?

de.en: Since all processing happens in your browser, performance depends on your device's capabilities. Large files require more memory and processing power. For best results, close other browser tabs and applications.
de.zh: 由于所有处理都在浏览器中进行，性能取决于您设备的能力。大文件需要更多的内存和处理能力。为了获得最佳结果，请关闭其他浏览器标签页和应用程序。
de.current: Since all processing happens in your browser, performance depends on your device's capabilities. Large files require more memory and processing power. For best results, close other browser tabs and applications.

de.en: Currently, PDFCraft requires an internet connection to load the application. However, once loaded, the PDF processing itself happens locally and doesn't require a connection.
de.zh: 目前，PDFCraft 需要互联网连接才能加载应用程序。但是，一旦加载，PDF 处理本身在本地进行，不需要连接。
de.current: Currently, PDFCraft requires an internet connection to load the application. However, once loaded, the PDF processing itself happens locally and doesn't require a connection.

de.en: PDFCraft is available in 9 languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Portuguese, and Arabic (with RTL support).
de.zh: PDFCraft 提供 9 种语言版本：英语、日语、韩语、西班牙语、法语、德语、中文、葡萄牙语和阿拉伯语（支持从右到左）。
de.current: PDFCraft is available in 9 languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Portuguese, and Arabic (with RTL support).

de.en: How do I change the language?
de.current: How do I change the language?

de.en: You can change the language using the language selector in the header. Your preference will be saved for future visits.
de.zh: 您可以使用顶部的语言选择器更改语言。您的偏好将被保存以供将来访问。
de.current: You can change the language using the language selector in the header. Your preference will be saved for future visits.

de.en: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to us.
de.zh: 找不到您想要的答案？请随时联系我们。
de.current: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to us.

de.en: {brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.
de.zh: {brand} 是一个免费、注重隐私的 PDF 工具包，完全在您的浏览器中运行。拥有 {count}+ 个专业工具，您可以编辑、转换、合并、分割和保护您的 PDF 文件，而无需将其上传到任何服务器。
de.current: {brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.

de.en: We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} – a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.
de.zh: 我们相信，每个人都应该能够使用强大的 PDF 工具，而无需牺牲隐私或支付昂贵的订阅费用。这就是为什么我们创建了 {brand} —— 一个将您的隐私放在首位的综合 PDF 工具包。
de.current: We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} – a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.

de.en: Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.
de.zh: 与要求您将文件上传到远程服务器的传统 PDF 服务不同，{brand} 在您的浏览器中本地处理所有内容。您的敏感文档从未离开您的设备，让您完全控制您的数据。
de.current: Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.

de.en: Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.
de.zh: 无论您是学生、专业人士还是普通用户，{brand} 都为您提供高效、安全地处理 PDF 所需的所有工具。
de.current: Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.

de.en: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.
de.zh: 您的文件从未离开您的设备。所有处理都在浏览器本地进行，确保完全的隐私和安全。
de.current: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.

de.en: Powered by modern web technologies, PDFCraft delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.
de.zh: 由现代 Web 技术驱动，PDFCraft 提供闪电般的 PDF 处理速度，无需上传或下载。
de.current: Powered by modern web technologies, PDFCraft delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.

de.en: Available in 9 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.
de.zh: 提供 9 种语言版本，可在任何带有现代浏览器的设备上工作。无需安装。
de.current: Available in 9 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.

de.en: PDFCraft is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.
de.zh: PDFCraft 完全免费使用，没有隐藏费用，无需注册，也不限制使用次数。
de.current: PDFCraft is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.

de.en: Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.
de.zh: 以透明为核心构建。我们的代码是开源的，允许任何人验证我们的隐私承诺。
de.current: Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.

de.en: Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.
de.zh: 根据全球用户的反馈开发。我们会根据您的需求不断改进。
de.current: Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.

de.en: {brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:
de.zh: {brand} 采用尖端 Web 技术构建，以确保最佳体验：
de.current: {brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:

de.zh: <strong1>Next.js</strong1> - 用于快速、SEO友好的页面渲染
<strong1>WebAssembly</strong1> - 提供近乎原生的 PDF 处理性能
<strong1>Web Workers</strong1> - 用于非阻塞后台处理
<strong1>pdf-lib & PDF.js</strong1> - 业界标准的 PDF 操作库

de.en: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work
de.zh: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - 用于安全地本地存储您的工作
de.current: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work

de.en: This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.
de.zh: 这种技术组合使我们能够提供专业级的 PDF 工具，完全在您的浏览器中运行，无需任何服务器端处理。
de.current: This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.

de.en: Explore our {count}+ PDF tools and see what {brand} can do for you.
de.zh: 探索我们的 {count}+ 个 PDF 工具，看看 {brand} 能为您做什么。
de.current: Explore our {count}+ PDF tools and see what {brand} can do for you.

de.en: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.
de.zh: 此工具可移除阻止打印、复制和编辑的所有者密码限制。它适用于有权限限制的PDF，但无法移除打开文档所需的用户密码。
de.current: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.

de.en: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.
de.zh: 请仅对您拥有或有权修改的PDF使用此工具。未经授权移除受版权保护材料的限制可能违反版权法。
de.current: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.

es.en: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.

es.current: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.

es.en: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.

es.current: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.

es.current: Only SHA-256 hashes are sent to the TSA servers. Full document privacy guaranteed.

es.current: Click any vector path, character, or shape to extract the code.

es.en: {count}+ free, secure, and easy-to-use tools for all your PDF needs.
es.zh: {count}+ 款免费、安全且易于使用的工具，满足您所有的 PDF 需求。
es.current: {count}+ free, secure, and easy-to-use tools for all your PDF needs.

es.en: Find answers to common questions about {brand}
es.zh: 查找有关 {brand} 的常见问题解答
es.current: Find answers to common questions about {brand}

es.en: No FAQs found matching your search.
es.zh: 未找到匹配的常见问题。
es.current: No FAQs found matching your search.

es.en: Yes, PDFCraft is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, no premium tiers, and no registration required. All features are available to everyone.
es.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 完全免费使用。没有隐藏费用，没有高级会员，也无需注册。所有功能对每个人开放。
es.current: Yes, PDFCraft is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, no premium tiers, and no registration required. All features are available to everyone.

es.en: Do I need to create an account?
es.current: Do I need to create an account?

es.en: No, you don't need to create an account or register to use PDFCraft. Simply visit the website and start using any tool immediately.
es.zh: 不需要，您无需创建账户或注册即可使用 PDFCraft。只需访问网站即可立即开始使用任何工具。
es.current: No, you don't need to create an account or register to use PDFCraft. Simply visit the website and start using any tool immediately.

es.en: Are my files uploaded to a server?
es.zh: 我的文件会被上传到服务器吗？
es.current: Are my files uploaded to a server?

es.en: No, your files are never uploaded to any server. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.
es.zh: 不会，您的文件从未上传到任何服务器。所有 PDF 处理都使用 JavaScript 和 WebAssembly 在浏览器本地进行。您的文件从未离开您的设备。
es.current: No, your files are never uploaded to any server. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.

es.en: Is it safe to use PDFCraft with sensitive documents?
es.zh: 使用 PDFCraft 处理敏感文档安全吗？
es.current: Is it safe to use PDFCraft with sensitive documents?

es.en: Yes, PDFCraft is designed with privacy in mind. Since all processing happens locally in your browser, your sensitive documents remain on your device and are never transmitted over the internet.
es.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 的设计以隐私为重。由于所有处理都在浏览器本地进行，您的敏感文档保留在您的设备上，从未通过互联网传输。
es.current: Yes, PDFCraft is designed with privacy in mind. Since all processing happens locally in your browser, your sensitive documents remain on your device and are never transmitted over the internet.

es.en: What happens to my files after processing?
es.zh: 处理后我的文件会怎样？
es.current: What happens to my files after processing?

es.en: Your files are stored temporarily in your browser's memory during processing. Once you close the browser tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store any of your files.
es.zh: 您的文件在处理过程中暂时存储在浏览器的内存中。一旦您关闭浏览器标签页或离开页面，所有文件数据将自动清除。我们不会存储您的任何文件。
es.current: Your files are stored temporarily in your browser's memory during processing. Once you close the browser tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store any of your files.

es.en: What PDF operations can I perform?
es.zh: 我可以执行哪些 PDF 操作？
es.current: What PDF operations can I perform?

es.en: PDFCraft offers 67+ tools including: merge, split, compress, convert (to/from images, text, JSON), edit, annotate, sign, add watermarks, encrypt/decrypt, OCR, and many more.
es.zh: PDFCraft 提供 67+ 个工具，包括：合并、分割、压缩、转换（转为/来自图像、文本、JSON）、编辑、注释、签名、添加水印、加密/解密、OCR 等等。
es.current: PDFCraft offers 67+ tools including: merge, split, compress, convert (to/from images, text, JSON), edit, annotate, sign, add watermarks, encrypt/decrypt, OCR, and many more.

es.en: Can I merge multiple PDF files?
es.zh: 我可以合并多个 PDF 文件吗？
es.current: Can I merge multiple PDF files?

es.en: Yes, you can merge multiple PDF files into one. Simply use the Merge PDF tool, upload your files, arrange them in the desired order, and click merge.
es.zh: 是的，您可以将多个 PDF 文件合并为一个。只需使用合并 PDF 工具，上传您的文件，按所需顺序排列，然后点击合并。
es.current: Yes, you can merge multiple PDF files into one. Simply use the Merge PDF tool, upload your files, arrange them in the desired order, and click merge.

es.en: Can I convert images to PDF?
es.zh: 我可以将图像转换为 PDF 吗？
es.current: Can I convert images to PDF?

es.en: Yes, PDFCraft supports converting various image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) to PDF. You can convert single or multiple images at once.
es.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 支持将各种图像格式（JPG、PNG、WebP、BMP、TIFF、SVG、HEIC）转换为 PDF。您可以一次转换单个或多个图像。
es.current: Yes, PDFCraft supports converting various image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) to PDF. You can convert single or multiple images at once.

es.en: Can I edit text in a PDF?
es.zh: 我可以编辑 PDF 中的文本吗？
es.current: Can I edit text in a PDF?

es.en: PDFCraft provides annotation and editing tools including highlighting, adding text, shapes, images, and signatures. For full text editing, the PDF Editor tool offers comprehensive annotation capabilities.
es.zh: PDFCraft 提供注释和编辑工具，包括高亮、添加文本、形状、图像和签名。如需全文编辑，PDF 编辑器工具提供全面的注释功能。
es.current: PDFCraft provides annotation and editing tools including highlighting, adding text, shapes, images, and signatures. For full text editing, the PDF Editor tool offers comprehensive annotation capabilities.

es.en: PDFCraft works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.
es.zh: PDFCraft 适用于所有现代浏览器，包括 Chrome、Firefox、Safari 和 Edge。我们建议使用最新版本的浏览器以获得最佳体验。
es.current: PDFCraft works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.

es.en: Is there a file size limit?
es.current: Is there a file size limit?

es.en: Most tools support files up to 100MB, with some tools like merge and compress supporting up to 500MB. These limits are in place to ensure smooth performance in your browser.
es.zh: 大多数工具支持最大 100MB 的文件，合并和压缩等工具支持最大 500MB。这些限制是为了确保浏览器中的流畅性能。
es.current: Most tools support files up to 100MB, with some tools like merge and compress supporting up to 500MB. These limits are in place to ensure smooth performance in your browser.

es.en: Why is processing slow for large files?
es.zh: 为什么大文件处理速度慢？
es.current: Why is processing slow for large files?

es.en: Since all processing happens in your browser, performance depends on your device's capabilities. Large files require more memory and processing power. For best results, close other browser tabs and applications.
es.zh: 由于所有处理都在浏览器中进行，性能取决于您设备的能力。大文件需要更多的内存和处理能力。为了获得最佳结果，请关闭其他浏览器标签页和应用程序。
es.current: Since all processing happens in your browser, performance depends on your device's capabilities. Large files require more memory and processing power. For best results, close other browser tabs and applications.

es.en: Currently, PDFCraft requires an internet connection to load the application. However, once loaded, the PDF processing itself happens locally and doesn't require a connection.
es.zh: 目前，PDFCraft 需要互联网连接才能加载应用程序。但是，一旦加载，PDF 处理本身在本地进行，不需要连接。
es.current: Currently, PDFCraft requires an internet connection to load the application. However, once loaded, the PDF processing itself happens locally and doesn't require a connection.

es.en: PDFCraft is available in 9 languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Portuguese, and Arabic (with RTL support).
es.zh: PDFCraft 提供 9 种语言版本：英语、日语、韩语、西班牙语、法语、德语、中文、葡萄牙语和阿拉伯语（支持从右到左）。
es.current: PDFCraft is available in 9 languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Portuguese, and Arabic (with RTL support).

es.en: How do I change the language?
es.current: How do I change the language?

es.en: You can change the language using the language selector in the header. Your preference will be saved for future visits.
es.zh: 您可以使用顶部的语言选择器更改语言。您的偏好将被保存以供将来访问。
es.current: You can change the language using the language selector in the header. Your preference will be saved for future visits.

es.en: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to us.
es.zh: 找不到您想要的答案？请随时联系我们。
es.current: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to us.

es.en: {brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.
es.zh: {brand} 是一个免费、注重隐私的 PDF 工具包，完全在您的浏览器中运行。拥有 {count}+ 个专业工具，您可以编辑、转换、合并、分割和保护您的 PDF 文件，而无需将其上传到任何服务器。
es.current: {brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.

es.en: We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} – a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.
es.zh: 我们相信，每个人都应该能够使用强大的 PDF 工具，而无需牺牲隐私或支付昂贵的订阅费用。这就是为什么我们创建了 {brand} —— 一个将您的隐私放在首位的综合 PDF 工具包。
es.current: We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} – a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.

es.en: Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.
es.zh: 与要求您将文件上传到远程服务器的传统 PDF 服务不同，{brand} 在您的浏览器中本地处理所有内容。您的敏感文档从未离开您的设备，让您完全控制您的数据。
es.current: Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.

es.en: Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.
es.zh: 无论您是学生、专业人士还是普通用户，{brand} 都为您提供高效、安全地处理 PDF 所需的所有工具。
es.current: Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.

es.en: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.
es.zh: 您的文件从未离开您的设备。所有处理都在浏览器本地进行，确保完全的隐私和安全。
es.current: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.

es.en: Powered by modern web technologies, PDFCraft delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.
es.zh: 由现代 Web 技术驱动，PDFCraft 提供闪电般的 PDF 处理速度，无需上传或下载。
es.current: Powered by modern web technologies, PDFCraft delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.

es.en: Available in 9 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.
es.zh: 提供 9 种语言版本，可在任何带有现代浏览器的设备上工作。无需安装。
es.current: Available in 9 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.

es.en: PDFCraft is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.
es.zh: PDFCraft 完全免费使用，没有隐藏费用，无需注册，也不限制使用次数。
es.current: PDFCraft is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.

es.en: Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.
es.zh: 以透明为核心构建。我们的代码是开源的，允许任何人验证我们的隐私承诺。
es.current: Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.

es.en: Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.
es.zh: 根据全球用户的反馈开发。我们会根据您的需求不断改进。
es.current: Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.

es.en: {brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:
es.zh: {brand} 采用尖端 Web 技术构建，以确保最佳体验：
es.current: {brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:

es.zh: <strong1>Next.js</strong1> - 用于快速、SEO友好的页面渲染
<strong1>WebAssembly</strong1> - 提供近乎原生的 PDF 处理性能
<strong1>Web Workers</strong1> - 用于非阻塞后台处理
<strong1>pdf-lib & PDF.js</strong1> - 业界标准的 PDF 操作库

es.en: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work
es.zh: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - 用于安全地本地存储您的工作
es.current: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work

es.en: This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.
es.zh: 这种技术组合使我们能够提供专业级的 PDF 工具，完全在您的浏览器中运行，无需任何服务器端处理。
es.current: This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.

es.en: Explore our {count}+ PDF tools and see what {brand} can do for you.
es.zh: 探索我们的 {count}+ 个 PDF 工具，看看 {brand} 能为您做什么。
es.current: Explore our {count}+ PDF tools and see what {brand} can do for you.

es.en: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
es.zh: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
es.current: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

es.en: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to browse. You can add multiple files.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，或点击浏览。可以添加多个文件。
es.current: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to browse. You can add multiple files.

es.en: Drag and drop to reorder files. Files will be merged in the order shown.
es.zh: 拖放以重新排序文件。文件将按显示顺序合并。
es.current: Drag and drop to reorder files. Files will be merged in the order shown.

es.en: Preserve bookmarks (create bookmark for each file)
es.zh: 保留书签（为每个文件创建书签）
es.current: Preserve bookmarks (create bookmark for each file)

es.en: PDFs merged successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: PDF合并成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: PDFs merged successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Click pages to select them for deletion, or enter page numbers/ranges above.
es.zh: 点击页面选择删除，或在上方输入页码/范围。
es.current: Click pages to select them for deletion, or enter page numbers/ranges above.

es.en: Selected pages will be permanently removed from the PDF. At least one page must remain.
es.zh: 选中的页面将从PDF中永久删除。至少需要保留一页。
es.current: Selected pages will be permanently removed from the PDF. At least one page must remain.

es.en: Pages deleted successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 页面删除成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Pages deleted successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Click pages to select them, or enter page numbers/ranges above.
es.zh: 点击页面选择，或在上方输入页码/范围。
es.current: Click pages to select them, or enter page numbers/ranges above.

es.en: Pages extracted successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 页面提取成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Pages extracted successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.zh: 例如：1-5, 8, 10-15（留空表示所有页面）

es.en: Each page will be split into {rows}×{cols} = {total} tiles.
es.zh: 每页将被分割为 {rows}×{cols} = {total} 个图块。
es.current: Each page will be split into {rows}×{cols} = {total} tiles.

es.en: PDF posterized successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: PDF海报化成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: PDF posterized successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Warning: Certificate is expired or not yet valid. Signing may still work but the signature will show as invalid.
es.zh: 警告：证书已过期或尚未生效。签名可能仍然有效，但显示为无效。
es.current: Warning: Certificate is expired or not yet valid. Signing may still work but the signature will show as invalid.

es.zh: 签名文本（可选，留空自动生成）

es.en: PDF signed successfully! The signature can be verified in any PDF reader.
es.zh: PDF 签名成功！可以在任何 PDF 阅读器中验证签名。
es.current: PDF signed successfully! The signature can be verified in any PDF reader.

es.en: Failed to fetch certificate chain. Check your internet connection and try again.
es.zh: 获取证书链失败。请检查网络连接并重试。
es.current: Failed to fetch certificate chain. Check your internet connection and try again.

es.zh: 读取 PEM 文件失败。
请选择 .pfx, .p12, 或 .pem 文件。

es.en: Please select a PNG or JPEG image.
es.zh: 请选择 PNG 或 JPEG 图片。
es.current: Please select a PNG or JPEG image.

es.en: Drag and drop a signed PDF file here, or click to browse.
es.zh: 将已签名的 PDF 文件拖放到此处，或点击浏览。
es.current: Drag and drop a signed PDF file here, or click to browse.

es.en: Upload a trusted CA certificate to verify the signature chain.
es.zh: 上传受信任的 CA 证书以验证签名链。
es.current: Upload a trusted CA certificate to verify the signature chain.

es.en: This PDF does not contain any digital signatures.
es.zh: 此 PDF 不包含任何数字签名。
es.current: This PDF does not contain any digital signatures.

es.en: Please select a .pem, .crt, .cer, or .der certificate file.
es.zh: 请选择 .pem, .crt, .cer, 或 .der 证书文件。
es.current: Please select a .pem, .crt, .cer, or .der certificate file.

es.en: Drag and drop a PDF file here to view its metadata.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以查看其元数据。
es.current: Drag and drop a PDF file here to view its metadata.

es.en: Metadata extracted successfully! You can export it as JSON if needed.
es.zh: 元数据提取成功！如需要可导出为JSON。
es.current: Metadata extracted successfully! You can export it as JSON if needed.

es.en: Drag and drop a PDF file here to edit its metadata.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以编辑其元数据。
es.current: Drag and drop a PDF file here to edit its metadata.

es.zh: 输入关键词，用逗号分隔

es.en: The modification date will be updated automatically when you save.
es.zh: 保存时修改日期将自动更新。
es.current: The modification date will be updated automatically when you save.

es.en: Metadata updated successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 元数据更新成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Metadata updated successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Use the toolbar above the PDF to add text, draw, highlight, or add images. Click the download button (💾) in the toolbar to save your edited PDF.
es.zh: 使用PDF上方的工具栏添加文本、绘图、高亮或添加图片。点击工具栏中的下载按钮（💾）保存编辑后的PDF。
es.current: Use the toolbar above the PDF to add text, draw, highlight, or add images. Click the download button (💾) in the toolbar to save your edited PDF.

es.en: Failed to save PDF. Please use the export button in the toolbar.
es.zh: 保存PDF失败。请使用工具栏中的导出按钮。
es.current: Failed to save PDF. Please use the export button in the toolbar.

es.en: PDF saved successfully! Click the download button to save your edited file.
es.zh: PDF保存成功！点击下载按钮保存编辑后的文件。
es.current: PDF saved successfully! Click the download button to save your edited file.

es.en: Select areas to permanently remove content. Redacted content cannot be recovered after saving.
es.zh: 选择要永久删除内容的区域。保存后涂黑的内容无法恢复。
es.current: Select areas to permanently remove content. Redacted content cannot be recovered after saving.

es.en: Drag and drop images here, or click to browse. Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC.
es.zh: 拖放图片到此处，或点击浏览。支持JPG、PNG、WebP、BMP、TIFF、SVG、HEIC。
es.current: Drag and drop images here, or click to browse. Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC.

es.en: Drag and drop to reorder images. Images will appear in the PDF in the order shown.
es.zh: 拖放以重新排序图片。图片将按显示顺序出现在PDF中。
es.current: Drag and drop to reorder images. Images will appear in the PDF in the order shown.

es.en: Higher quality produces sharper images but larger file sizes.
es.zh: 更高的质量会产生更清晰的图像，但文件更大。
es.current: Higher quality produces sharper images but larger file sizes.

es.en: Images converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 图片已成功转换为PDF！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Images converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Drag and drop PDF files here. You can compress up to 10 files at once.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处。一次最多可压缩10个文件。
es.current: Drag and drop PDF files here. You can compress up to 10 files at once.

es.en: Maximum compression with object stream optimization
es.zh: 最大压缩，优化对象流结构
es.current: Maximum compression with object stream optimization

es.zh: 平衡压缩，优化文档结构
适度压缩，保留更多结构
最小压缩，保留原始质量
移除元数据（标题、作者等）

es.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to sign.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行签名。
es.current: Drag and drop a PDF file to sign.

es.en: Click the Signature tool (pen icon) in the toolbar
es.zh: 点击工具栏中的签名工具（钢笔图标）
es.current: Click the Signature tool (pen icon) in the toolbar

es.en: Draw, type, or upload your signature
es.zh: 绘制、输入或上传您的签名
es.current: Draw, type, or upload your signature

es.en: Click where you want to place the signature
es.zh: 点击要放置签名的位置
es.current: Click where you want to place the signature

es.en: Click "Save Signed PDF" below when done
es.zh: 完成后点击下方的「保存签名PDF」
es.current: Click "Save Signed PDF" below when done

es.zh: 扁平化签名（推荐 - 使签名永久）

es.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to crop.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行裁剪。
es.current: Drag and drop a PDF file to crop.

es.en: Drag and drop PDF files to repair.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行修复。
es.current: Drag and drop PDF files to repair.

es.en: Each page will be divided based on the selected option.
es.zh: 每页将根据所选选项进行分割。
es.current: Each page will be divided based on the selected option.

es.en: 🔒 Your passwords are processed locally and never sent to any server.
es.zh: 🔒 您的密码在本地处理，永远不会发送到任何服务器。
es.current: 🔒 Your passwords are processed locally and never sent to any server.

es.en: Required to open and view the PDF.
es.zh: 打开和查看PDF时需要此密码。
es.current: Required to open and view the PDF.

es.en: Required to modify permissions or remove encryption.
es.zh: 修改权限或移除加密时需要此密码。
es.current: Required to modify permissions or remove encryption.

es.en: Remember to save your passwords securely.
es.current: Remember to save your passwords securely.

es.en: Drag and drop an encrypted PDF file.
es.zh: 拖放加密的PDF文件到此处。
es.current: Drag and drop an encrypted PDF file.

es.en: 🔒 Your password is processed locally and never sent to any server.
es.zh: 🔒 您的密码在本地处理，永远不会发送到任何服务器。
es.current: 🔒 Your password is processed locally and never sent to any server.

es.en: Leave empty if the PDF only has owner password restrictions.
es.zh: 如果PDF仅有所有者密码限制，可留空。
es.current: Leave empty if the PDF only has owner password restrictions.

es.en: The PDF is now unlocked and can be opened without a password.
es.zh: PDF现已解锁，无需密码即可打开。
es.current: The PDF is now unlocked and can be opened without a password.

es.en: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
es.zh: 您输入的密码不正确，请检查后重试。
es.current: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.

es.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to rotate pages.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以旋转页面。
es.current: Drag and drop a PDF file to rotate pages.

es.en: Click the rotation buttons on each page to rotate individually, or use the buttons above to rotate all pages.
es.zh: 点击每页上的旋转按钮单独旋转，或使用上方按钮旋转所有页面。
es.current: Click the rotation buttons on each page to rotate individually, or use the buttons above to rotate all pages.

es.en: Rotation completed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 旋转完成！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Rotation completed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to add blank pages.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以添加空白页。
es.current: Drag and drop a PDF file to add blank pages.

es.en: Enter 0 to insert at the beginning, or {total} to insert at the end.
es.zh: 输入 0 在开头插入，或输入 {total} 在末尾插入。
es.current: Enter 0 to insert at the beginning, or {total} to insert at the end.

es.en: Blank pages added successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 空白页添加成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Blank pages added successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to reverse page order.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以反转页面顺序。
es.current: Drag and drop a PDF file to reverse page order.

es.en: This will reverse the order of all pages in your PDF. The last page will become the first, and so on.
es.zh: 这将反转PDF中所有页面的顺序。最后一页将变成第一页，依此类推。
es.current: This will reverse the order of all pages in your PDF. The last page will become the first, and so on.

es.en: Page order reversed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 页面顺序反转成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Page order reversed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Upload two or more PDF files to interleave their pages alternately.
es.zh: 上传两个或更多PDF文件以交替合并页面。
es.current: Upload two or more PDF files to interleave their pages alternately.

es.en: Drag and drop to reorder files. Pages will be interleaved in the order shown (1st page from file 1, 1st page from file 2, 2nd page from file 1, etc.).
es.zh: 拖放以重新排序文件。页面将按显示顺序交替合并（文件1的第1页，文件2的第1页，文件1的第2页，依此类推）。
es.current: Drag and drop to reorder files. Pages will be interleaved in the order shown (1st page from file 1, 1st page from file 2, 2nd page from file 1, etc.).

es.en: Enable this for back-to-front scanned documents
es.zh: 适用于从后往前扫描的文档
es.current: Enable this for back-to-front scanned documents

es.en: Pages are interleaved alternately: Page 1 from File 1, Page 1 from File 2, Page 2 from File 1, Page 2 from File 2, and so on. If documents have different page counts, extra pages are appended at the end.
es.zh: 页面交替合并：文件1的第1页，文件2的第1页，文件1的第2页，文件2的第2页，依此类推。如果文档页数不同，多余的页面将附加在末尾。
es.current: Pages are interleaved alternately: Page 1 from File 1, Page 1 from File 2, Page 2 from File 1, Page 2 from File 2, and so on. If documents have different page counts, extra pages are appended at the end.

es.en: PDFs interleaved successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: PDF交替合并成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: PDFs interleaved successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.zh: 在页面之间添加分隔线

es.en: {pages} pages will be combined into 1 continuous {orientation} page.
es.zh: {pages} 页将合并为 1 个连续的{orientation}页面。
es.current: {pages} pages will be combined into 1 continuous {orientation} page.

es.en: Pages combined successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 页面合并成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Pages combined successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Select the PDF file to add attachments to.
es.zh: 选择要添加附件的PDF文件。
es.current: Select the PDF file to add attachments to.

es.en: Select files to embed in the PDF. Any file type is supported.
es.zh: 选择要嵌入PDF的文件。支持任何文件类型。
es.current: Select files to embed in the PDF. Any file type is supported.

es.en: Specify which pages to attach files to.
es.zh: 指定要附加文件的页面。
es.current: Specify which pages to attach files to.

es.en: Attachments added successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 附件添加成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Attachments added successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Select a PDF file to view and manage its attachments.
es.zh: 选择PDF文件以查看和管理其附件。
es.current: Select a PDF file to view and manage its attachments.

es.en: No attachments found in this PDF file.
es.current: No attachments found in this PDF file.

es.zh: 已选择 {count} 个附件待移除

es.en: Please select at least one attachment to remove.
es.zh: 请至少选择一个附件进行移除。
es.current: Please select at least one attachment to remove.

es.en: Attachments removed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 附件移除成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Attachments removed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Drag and drop or click to browse
es.current: Drag and drop or click to browse

es.zh: 差异视图（红色区域显示变化）

es.en: Comparison complete! Use the view modes and page navigation to explore differences.
es.zh: 比较完成！使用查看模式和页面导航来探索差异。
es.current: Comparison complete! Use the view modes and page navigation to explore differences.

es.en: Drag and drop PDF files to package.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行打包。
es.current: Drag and drop PDF files to package.

es.en: Successfully packaged PDF files into a ZIP archive. Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: PDF文件已成功打包为ZIP压缩包。点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Successfully packaged PDF files into a ZIP archive. Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Drag and drop text files here, or click to browse.
es.zh: 拖放文本文件到此处，或点击浏览。
es.current: Drag and drop text files here, or click to browse.

es.en: Text converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 文本已成功转换为PDF！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Text converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Drag and drop text files here, or click to browse.
es.zh: 拖放文本文件到此处，或点击浏览。
es.current: Drag and drop text files here, or click to browse.

es.en: Text converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: 文本已成功转换为PDF！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: Text converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Type or paste your text here...
es.current: Type or paste your text here...

es.en: Please enter some text to convert.
es.current: Please enter some text to convert.

es.en: Please add at least 1 text file.
es.zh: 请至少添加1个文本文件。
es.current: Please add at least 1 text file.

es.current: Drag and drop a JSON file.

es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处转换为灰度。
es.current: Drag and drop a PDF file to convert to greyscale.

es.en: PDF extracted to JSON successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: PDF已成功提取为JSON！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: PDF extracted to JSON successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: Drag and drop a scanned PDF file here, or click to browse.
es.zh: 拖放扫描的PDF文件到此处，或点击浏览。
es.current: Drag and drop a scanned PDF file here, or click to browse.

es.en: Select one or more languages for better accuracy
es.zh: 选择一种或多种语言以提高准确性
es.current: Select one or more languages for better accuracy

es.en: OCR completed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
es.zh: OCR完成！点击下载按钮保存文件。
es.current: OCR completed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.

es.en: OCR (Optical Character Recognition) extracts text from scanned documents and images. For best results, use high-quality scans and select the correct language(s).
es.zh: OCR（光学字符识别）从扫描文档和图像中提取文本。为获得最佳效果，请使用高质量扫描件并选择正确的语言。
es.current: OCR (Optical Character Recognition) extracts text from scanned documents and images. For best results, use high-quality scans and select the correct language(s).

es.en: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to browse. You can select multiple files.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，或点击浏览。可以选择多个文件。
es.current: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to browse. You can select multiple files.

es.en: Linearization optimizes PDFs for fast web viewing. The first page will display before the entire file is downloaded, improving user experience for web-hosted documents.
es.zh: 线性化优化PDF以实现快速网页浏览。第一页会在整个文件下载完成前显示，改善网页托管文档的用户体验。
es.current: Linearization optimizes PDFs for fast web viewing. The first page will display before the entire file is downloaded, improving user experience for web-hosted documents.

es.en: Use object streams for better compression
es.zh: 使用对象流以获得更好的压缩
es.current: Use object streams for better compression

es.en: Recommended for smaller file sizes. Disable for maximum compatibility with older PDF readers.
es.zh: 推荐使用以获得更小的文件大小。如需与旧版PDF阅读器兼容，请禁用此选项。
es.current: Recommended for smaller file sizes. Disable for maximum compatibility with older PDF readers.

es.en: Showing first 50 pages. Download JSON for complete data.
es.zh: 显示前50页。下载JSON获取完整数据。
es.current: Showing first 50 pages. Download JSON for complete data.

es.en: Drag and drop a restricted PDF file.
es.zh: 拖放受限制的PDF文件到此处。
es.current: Drag and drop a restricted PDF file.

es.zh: 如果知道所有者密码请输入

es.en: If the PDF has an owner password, enter it here for better results.
es.zh: 如果PDF有所有者密码，在此输入可获得更好的结果。
es.current: If the PDF has an owner password, enter it here for better results.

es.en: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.
es.zh: 此工具可移除阻止打印、复制和编辑的所有者密码限制。它适用于有权限限制的PDF，但无法移除打开文档所需的用户密码。
es.current: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.

es.en: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.
es.zh: 请仅对您拥有或有权修改的PDF使用此工具。未经授权移除受版权保护材料的限制可能违反版权法。
es.current: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.

es.en: The PDF can now be printed, copied, and edited without restrictions.
es.zh: PDF现在可以无限制地打印、复制和编辑。
es.current: The PDF can now be printed, copied, and edited without restrictions.

es.en: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
es.zh: 您输入的密码不正确，请检查后重试。
es.current: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.

es.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to sanitize.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行清理。
es.current: Drag and drop a PDF file to sanitize.

es.en: Sanitization removes potentially harmful content from PDFs, making them safer to open and share.
es.zh: 清理功能会移除PDF中潜在的有害内容，使其更安全地打开和分享。
es.current: Sanitization removes potentially harmful content from PDFs, making them safer to open and share.

es.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to flatten.
es.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行扁平化。
es.current: Drag and drop a PDF file to flatten.

es.en: Removing metadata helps protect your privacy by stripping identifying information from the PDF.
es.zh: 移除元数据有助于保护您的隐私，从PDF中删除识别信息。
es.current: Removing metadata helps protect your privacy by stripping identifying information from the PDF.

es.en: 🔒 Your passwords are processed locally and never sent to any server.
es.zh: 🔒 您的密码在本地处理，永远不会发送到任何服务器。
es.current: 🔒 Your passwords are processed locally and never sent to any server.

es.en: Required if the PDF is already password-protected.

es.current: Required if the PDF is already password-protected.

需要此密码才能执行权限限制。

es.current: Note: Permission enforcement requires PDF encryption. Set an owner password below to enforce restrictions.

es.en: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.
es.zh: 值越高判定条件越宽松，即使带有少许墨迹或噪点的页面也会被当成空白页删除。系统推荐删除的页面会显示为置灰和红圈禁止符。你可以直接点击卡片来强行保留或删除某页。
es.current: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.

fr.en: Applies local CLAHE histogram enhancement to bleach moldy shadows and sharply boost blue/black signatures and red stamp ink.
fr.zh: 采用高级局部对比度直方图增强(CLAHE)算法。将手机拍摄照片中发黄、霉斑阴影背景强效漂白，加粗加浓蓝/黑色签字笔锋和红色印章。

fr.en: 🔒 Your password is processed locally and never sent to any server.

fr.en: This will reverse the order of all pages in your PDF. The last page will become the first, and so on.
fr.zh: 这将反转PDF中所有页面的顺序。最后一页将变成第一页，依此类推。
fr.current: This will reverse the order of all pages in your PDF. The last page will become the first, and so on.

fr.current: Upload two or more PDF files to interleave their pages alternately.

fr.en: Drag and drop to reorder files. Pages will be interleaved in the order shown (1st page from file 1, 1st page from file 2, 2nd page from file 1, etc.).
fr.zh: 拖放以重新排序文件。页面将按显示顺序交替合并（文件1的第1页，文件2的第1页，文件1的第2页，依此类推）。
fr.current: Drag and drop to reorder files. Pages will be interleaved in the order shown (1st page from file 1, 1st page from file 2, 2nd page from file 1, etc.).

fr.current: Enable this for back-to-front scanned documents

fr.zh: 页面交替合并：文件1的第1页，文件2的第1页，文件1的第2页，文件2的第2页，依此类推。如果文档页数不同，多余的页面将附加在末尾。
fr.current: Pages are interleaved alternately: Page 1 from File 1, Page 1 from File 2, Page 2 from File 1, Page 2 from File 2, and so on. If documents have different page counts, extra pages are appended at the end.

fr.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，或点击浏览。可以选择多个文件。
fr.current: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to browse. You can select multiple files.

fr.en: Linearization optimizes PDFs for fast web viewing. The first page will display before the entire file is downloaded, improving user experience for web-hosted documents.
fr.zh: 线性化优化PDF以实现快速网页浏览。第一页会在整个文件下载完成前显示，改善网页托管文档的用户体验。
fr.current: Linearization optimizes PDFs for fast web viewing. The first page will display before the entire file is downloaded, improving user experience for web-hosted documents.

fr.en: Use object streams for better compression
fr.zh: 使用对象流以获得更好的压缩
fr.current: Use object streams for better compression

fr.en: Recommended for smaller file sizes. Disable for maximum compatibility with older PDF readers.
fr.zh: 推荐使用以获得更小的文件大小。如需与旧版PDF阅读器兼容，请禁用此选项。
fr.current: Recommended for smaller file sizes. Disable for maximum compatibility with older PDF readers.

fr.en: Showing first 50 pages. Download JSON for complete data.
fr.zh: 显示前50页。下载JSON获取完整数据。
fr.current: Showing first 50 pages. Download JSON for complete data.

fr.en: Drag and drop a restricted PDF file.
fr.zh: 拖放受限制的PDF文件到此处。
fr.current: Drag and drop a restricted PDF file.

fr.zh: 如果知道所有者密码请输入

fr.en: If the PDF has an owner password, enter it here for better results.
fr.zh: 如果PDF有所有者密码，在此输入可获得更好的结果。
fr.current: If the PDF has an owner password, enter it here for better results.

fr.en: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.
fr.zh: 此工具可移除阻止打印、复制和编辑的所有者密码限制。它适用于有权限限制的PDF，但无法移除打开文档所需的用户密码。
fr.current: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.

fr.en: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.
fr.zh: 请仅对您拥有或有权修改的PDF使用此工具。未经授权移除受版权保护材料的限制可能违反版权法。
fr.current: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.

fr.en: The PDF can now be printed, copied, and edited without restrictions.
fr.zh: PDF现在可以无限制地打印、复制和编辑。
fr.current: The PDF can now be printed, copied, and edited without restrictions.

fr.en: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
fr.zh: 您输入的密码不正确，请检查后重试。
fr.current: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.

fr.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to sanitize.
fr.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行清理。
fr.current: Drag and drop a PDF file to sanitize.

fr.en: Sanitization removes potentially harmful content from PDFs, making them safer to open and share.
fr.zh: 清理功能会移除PDF中潜在的有害内容，使其更安全地打开和分享。
fr.current: Sanitization removes potentially harmful content from PDFs, making them safer to open and share.

fr.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to flatten.
fr.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行扁平化。
fr.current: Drag and drop a PDF file to flatten.

fr.en: Removing metadata helps protect your privacy by stripping identifying information from the PDF.
fr.zh: 移除元数据有助于保护您的隐私，从PDF中删除识别信息。
fr.current: Removing metadata helps protect your privacy by stripping identifying information from the PDF.

fr.en: 🔒 Your passwords are processed locally and never sent to any server.
fr.zh: 🔒 您的密码在本地处理，永远不会发送到任何服务器。
fr.current: 🔒 Your passwords are processed locally and never sent to any server.

fr.en: Required if the PDF is already password-protected.
fr.zh: 如果PDF已受密码保护，则需要输入。
fr.current: Required if the PDF is already password-protected.

fr.zh: 用户需要此密码才能打开PDF。
fr.current: Users will need this password to open the PDF.

fr.zh: 新所有者密码（更改权限）
需要此密码才能执行权限限制。

fr.en: Note: Permission enforcement requires PDF encryption. Set an owner password below to enforce restrictions.
fr.zh: 注意：权限执行需要PDF加密。请在下方设置所有者密码以执行限制。
fr.current: Note: Permission enforcement requires PDF encryption. Set an owner password below to enforce restrictions.

fr.en: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.
fr.zh: 值越高判定条件越宽松，即使带有少许墨迹或噪点的页面也会被当成空白页删除。系统推荐删除的页面会显示为置灰和红圈禁止符。你可以直接点击卡片来强行保留或删除某页。
fr.current: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.

id.en: Physical binary IFD compositor, stitching multiple high-fidelity pages directly into a single multi-page TIFF.
id.zh: 手写手写手写手写手写手写二进制 IFD 拼接编译器，直接合并生成单个包含多页面（Multi-page）的合法高保真 TIFF。
id.current: Physical binary IFD compositor, stitching multiple high-fidelity pages directly into a single multi-page TIFF.

id.zh: 3D 晶格像素密度与光谱实时预览

id.en: 24-bit RGB Color: 3 bytes per pixel. Preserves high-fidelity full color spectrum.
id.zh: 24-bit 印刷全彩 (RGB)：每像素占用 3 字节，完美还原丰富的光谱色彩。
id.current: 24-bit RGB Color: 3 bytes per pixel. Preserves high-fidelity full color spectrum.

id.en: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.
id.zh: 8-bit 专业灰度：使用经典光敏系数脱色，层次分明，适合黑白文卷存档。
id.current: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.

id.en: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.
id.zh: 1-bit 纯黑白二值：基于半色调 127 阀值二值化，极具对比度，体积缩减至 1/24。
id.current: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.

id.zh: 2. 印刷级多页 TIFF 输出配置
A. 色彩表达模式 (Color Mode)
B. 图像压缩算法 (Compression Method)
C. 高精度 DPI 分辨率滑轨 (Resolution)

id.en: Multi-page TIFF documents scroll smoothly in Photoshop or Acrobat, yet remain raster bitmapped. For text and vector lines, we recommend at least
id.zh: 多页 TIFF (Multi-page TIFF) 在导入 Acrobat 或 Photoshop 时，可像 PDF 一样顺畅地进行页面上下滚动，但其完全由光栅位图构成。对图表和文字，我们极力推荐使用

id.en: OCR (Optical Character Recognition) extracts text from scanned documents and images. For best results, use high-quality scans and select the correct language(s).

id.en: Linearization optimizes PDFs for fast web viewing. The first page will display before the entire file is downloaded, improving user experience for web-hosted documents.
id.zh: 线性化优化PDF以实现快速网页浏览。第一页会在整个文件下载完成前显示，改善网页托管文档的用户体验。
id.current: Linearization optimizes PDFs for fast web viewing. The first page will display before the entire file is downloaded, improving user experience for web-hosted documents.

id.current: Use object streams for better compression

id.en: Recommended for smaller file sizes. Disable for maximum compatibility with older PDF readers.
id.zh: 推荐使用以获得更小的文件大小。如需与旧版PDF阅读器兼容，请禁用此选项。
id.current: Recommended for smaller file sizes. Disable for maximum compatibility with older PDF readers.

id.current: If the PDF has an owner password, enter it here for better results.

id.en: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.
id.zh: 此工具可移除阻止打印、复制和编辑的所有者密码限制。它适用于有权限限制的PDF，但无法移除打开文档所需的用户密码。
id.current: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.

id.en: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.
id.zh: 请仅对您拥有或有权修改的PDF使用此工具。未经授权移除受版权保护材料的限制可能违反版权法。
id.current: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.

id.en: The PDF can now be printed, copied, and edited without restrictions.
id.zh: PDF现在可以无限制地打印、复制和编辑。
id.current: The PDF can now be printed, copied, and edited without restrictions.

id.en: Sanitization removes potentially harmful content from PDFs, making them safer to open and share.

id.current: Sanitization removes potentially harmful content from PDFs, making them safer to open and share.

it.en: 24-bit RGB Color: 3 bytes per pixel. Preserves high-fidelity full color spectrum.
it.zh: 24-bit 印刷全彩 (RGB)：每像素占用 3 字节，完美还原丰富的光谱色彩。

it.en: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.
it.zh: 8-bit 专业灰度：使用经典光敏系数脱色，层次分明，适合黑白文卷存档。
it.current: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.

it.en: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.
it.zh: 1-bit 纯黑白二值：基于半色调 127 阀值二值化，极具对比度，体积缩减至 1/24。
it.current: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.

pt.en: The reconstructed searchable PDF embeds an invisible, perfectly aligned text layer above the scanned pixels. Keeps the original appearance while enabling full text highlighting, searching, and copying.

pt.current: The reconstructed searchable PDF embeds an invisible, perfectly aligned text layer above the scanned pixels. Keeps the original appearance while enabling full text highlighting, searching, and copying.

pt.en: Physical binary IFD compositor, stitching multiple high-fidelity pages directly into a single multi-page TIFF.
pt.zh: 手写手写手写手写手写手写二进制 IFD 拼接编译器，直接合并生成单个包含多页面（Multi-page）的合法高保真 TIFF。
pt.current: Physical binary IFD compositor, stitching multiple high-fidelity pages directly into a single multi-page TIFF.

pt.zh: 3D 晶格像素密度与光谱实时预览

pt.en: 24-bit RGB Color: 3 bytes per pixel. Preserves high-fidelity full color spectrum.
pt.zh: 24-bit 印刷全彩 (RGB)：每像素占用 3 字节，完美还原丰富的光谱色彩。
pt.current: 24-bit RGB Color: 3 bytes per pixel. Preserves high-fidelity full color spectrum.

pt.en: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.
pt.zh: 8-bit 专业灰度：使用经典光敏系数脱色，层次分明，适合黑白文卷存档。
pt.current: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.

pt.en: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.
pt.zh: 1-bit 纯黑白二值：基于半色调 127 阀值二值化，极具对比度，体积缩减至 1/24。
pt.current: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.

pt.zh: 2. 印刷级多页 TIFF 输出配置
A. 色彩表达模式 (Color Mode)
B. 图像压缩算法 (Compression Method)
C. 高精度 DPI 分辨率滑轨 (Resolution)

pt.zh: 多页 TIFF (Multi-page TIFF) 在导入 Acrobat 或 Photoshop 时，可像 PDF 一样顺畅地进行页面上下滚动，但其完全由光栅位图构成。对图表和文字，我们极力推荐使用

pt.en: Drag & drop PDF here. Fully supports encrypted PDFs with automated local decryption.
pt.zh: 将 PDF 文件拖放到此处。支持所有标准和加密 PDF 的自动解密载入。
pt.current: Drag & drop PDF here. Fully supports encrypted PDFs with automated local decryption.

pt.zh: 1. 选择受信任 TSA 服务器 (RFC 3161)

pt.en: Only SHA-256 hashes are sent to the TSA servers. Full document privacy guaranteed.
pt.zh: 系统只发送无规律的 SHA-256 哈希值与服务器交互，绝对保障文档隐私。
pt.current: Only SHA-256 hashes are sent to the TSA servers. Full document privacy guaranteed.

pt.en: Uploading hash streams. Generating authoritative RFC 3161 timestamps.
pt.zh: 上传文件并选择 TSA，点击“签署可信时间戳”生成由权威授时中心盖章的加密证书凭证。

pt.current: Drag and drop PDFs with logos, diagrams, CAD drawings, or mathematical formulas. Rebuilds layers into high-fidelity SVGs.

pt.en: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.
pt.zh: 值越高判定条件越宽松，即使带有少许墨迹或噪点的页面也会被当成空白页删除。系统推荐删除的页面会显示为置灰和红圈禁止符。你可以直接点击卡片来强行保留或删除某页。
pt.current: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.

ro.current: 24-bit RGB Color: 3 bytes per pixel. Preserves high-fidelity full color spectrum.

ro.en: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.
ro.zh: 8-bit 专业灰度：使用经典光敏系数脱色，层次分明，适合黑白文卷存档。
ro.current: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.

ro.en: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.
ro.zh: 1-bit 纯黑白二值：基于半色调 127 阀值二值化，极具对比度，体积缩减至 1/24。
ro.current: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.

vi.en: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.

vi.current: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.

vi.en: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.
vi.zh: 请仅对您拥有或有权修改的PDF使用此工具。未经授权移除受版权保护材料的限制可能违反版权法。

ar.zh: 手写手写手写手写手写手写二进制 IFD 拼接编译器，直接合并生成单个包含多页面（Multi-page）的合法高保真 TIFF。
ar.current: Physical binary IFD compositor, stitching multiple high-fidelity pages directly into a single multi-page TIFF.

ar.zh: 3D 晶格像素密度与光谱实时预览

ar.en: 24-bit RGB Color: 3 bytes per pixel. Preserves high-fidelity full color spectrum.
ar.zh: 24-bit 印刷全彩 (RGB)：每像素占用 3 字节，完美还原丰富的光谱色彩。
ar.current: 24-bit RGB Color: 3 bytes per pixel. Preserves high-fidelity full color spectrum.

ar.en: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.
ar.zh: 8-bit 专业灰度：使用经典光敏系数脱色，层次分明，适合黑白文卷存档。
ar.current: 8-bit Grayscale: Converts colors to balanced luminances, ideal for scanning black-and-white archives.

ar.en: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.
ar.zh: 1-bit 纯黑白二值：基于半色调 127 阀值二值化，极具对比度，体积缩减至 1/24。
ar.current: 1-bit Monochromatic: Half-tone 127 binarization threshold, extreme contrast, shrinks file sizes by 24x.

ar.zh: 2. 印刷级多页 TIFF 输出配置
A. 色彩表达模式 (Color Mode)
B. 图像压缩算法 (Compression Method)
C. 高精度 DPI 分辨率滑轨 (Resolution)

ar.en: Multi-page TIFF documents scroll smoothly in Photoshop or Acrobat, yet remain raster bitmapped. For text and vector lines, we recommend at least
ar.zh: 多页 TIFF (Multi-page TIFF) 在导入 Acrobat 或 Photoshop 时，可像 PDF 一样顺畅地进行页面上下滚动，但其完全由光栅位图构成。对图表和文字，我们极力推荐使用
ar.current: Multi-page TIFF documents scroll smoothly in Photoshop or Acrobat, yet remain raster bitmapped. For text and vector lines, we recommend at least

ar.zh: 🎉 单文件多页 TIFF 编译成功！所有页面已合并就位。一键极速下载。
ar.current: 🎉 Single-file multi-page TIFF compiled successfully! Download ready.

ar.zh: 当前视图下没有页面可供显示

ar.zh: 系统已清理 {count} 页空白页，保留并重新编译了剩余页面。
ar.current: Successfully purged {count} blank page(s) and recompiled the PDF locally.

ar.zh: 选择下方页面，使用快调或无极表盘精准矫正歪斜或翻转的文档。
ar.current: Select pages below and use the dials/slider to align or rotate pages.

ar.en: Angles will automatically normalize to [-180°, 180°] when blurred or submitted.
ar.zh: 输入提示：您可以输入任意角度，比如较大值，在失焦或按下回车时系统将自动取模规范化在 [-180°, 180°] 的等效区间内。
ar.current: Angles will automatically normalize to [-180°, 180°] when blurred or submitted.

ar.zh: 开始旋转 {count} 个已校准页面

ar.en: 🎉 PDF pages rotated successfully! Click download above to save.

ar.current: 🎉 PDF pages rotated successfully! Click download above to save.

ar.current: Click page thumbnail to select • Drag controllers to fine-tune alignments

ar.en: Drag & drop PDF here. Fully supports encrypted PDFs with automated local decryption.
ar.zh: 将 PDF 文件拖放到此处。支持所有标准和加密 PDF 的自动解密载入。
ar.current: Drag & drop PDF here. Fully supports encrypted PDFs with automated local decryption.

ar.zh: 1. 选择受信任 TSA 服务器 (RFC 3161)

ar.en: Only SHA-256 hashes are sent to the TSA servers. Full document privacy guaranteed.
ar.zh: 系统只发送无规律的 SHA-256 哈希值与服务器交互，绝对保障文档隐私。
ar.current: Only SHA-256 hashes are sent to the TSA servers. Full document privacy guaranteed.

ar.en: Uploading hash streams. Generating authoritative RFC 3161 timestamps.
ar.zh: 上传文件并选择 TSA，点击“签署可信时间戳”生成由权威授时中心盖章的加密证书凭证。
ar.current: Uploading hash streams. Generating authoritative RFC 3161 timestamps.

ar.zh: 电子存证可信时间戳凭据
上传需要提取矢量的 PDF 文件

ar.en: Drag and drop PDFs with logos, diagrams, CAD drawings, or mathematical formulas. Rebuilds layers into high-fidelity SVGs.
ar.zh: 拖放带有徽标 Logo、插图、CAD 图表或复杂数学公式的 PDF。系统将把图层翻译为高保真 SVG 画布。
ar.current: Drag and drop PDFs with logos, diagrams, CAD drawings, or mathematical formulas. Rebuilds layers into high-fidelity SVGs.

ar.en: Hover to highlight vectors in 3D, click to select.
ar.zh: 移动鼠标悬停以 3D 包围高亮元素，点击选择。
ar.current: Hover to highlight vectors in 3D, click to select.

ar.en: Click any vector path, character, or shape to extract the code.
ar.zh: 点击左侧画布上的任何矢量线条、文字或色块进行高保真单独提取。
ar.current: Click any vector path, character, or shape to extract the code.

ar.en: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
ar.zh: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
ar.current: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

ar.en: Warning: Certificate is expired or not yet valid. Signing may still work but the signature will show as invalid.
ar.zh: 警告：证书已过期或尚未生效。签名可能仍然有效，但显示为无效。
ar.current: Warning: Certificate is expired or not yet valid. Signing may still work but the signature will show as invalid.

ar.zh: 签名文本（可选，留空自动生成）

ar.en: PDF signed successfully! The signature can be verified in any PDF reader.
ar.zh: PDF 签名成功！可以在任何 PDF 阅读器中验证签名。
ar.current: PDF signed successfully! The signature can be verified in any PDF reader.

ar.en: Failed to fetch certificate chain. Check your internet connection and try again.
ar.zh: 获取证书链失败。请检查网络连接并重试。
ar.current: Failed to fetch certificate chain. Check your internet connection and try again.

ar.zh: 读取 PEM 文件失败。
请选择 .pfx, .p12, 或 .pem 文件。

ar.en: Please select a PNG or JPEG image.
ar.zh: 请选择 PNG 或 JPEG 图片。
ar.current: Please select a PNG or JPEG image.

ar.en: Drag and drop a signed PDF file here, or click to browse.
ar.zh: 将已签名的 PDF 文件拖放到此处，或点击浏览。
ar.current: Drag and drop a signed PDF file here, or click to browse.

ar.en: Upload a trusted CA certificate to verify the signature chain.
ar.zh: 上传受信任的 CA 证书以验证签名链。
ar.current: Upload a trusted CA certificate to verify the signature chain.

ar.en: This PDF does not contain any digital signatures.
ar.zh: 此 PDF 不包含任何数字签名。
ar.current: This PDF does not contain any digital signatures.

ar.en: Please select a .pem, .crt, .cer, or .der certificate file.
ar.zh: 请选择 .pem, .crt, .cer, 或 .der 证书文件。
ar.current: Please select a .pem, .crt, .cer, or .der certificate file.

ar.en: Showing first page only for better performance
ar.zh: 仅展示首页预览以优化性能
ar.current: Showing first page only for better performance

ar.en: Reading pages and computing information entropy...
ar.zh: 正在读取页面并计算信息熵...
ar.current: Reading pages and computing information entropy...

ar.en: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.
ar.zh: 值越高判定条件越宽松，即使带有少许墨迹或噪点的页面也会被当成空白页删除。系统推荐删除的页面会显示为置灰和红圈禁止符。你可以直接点击卡片来强行保留或删除某页。
ar.current: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.
